title: The Phantom Bandit
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is sent to spooky Cacklefur Castle for a 'stress-free' vacation, but soon uncovers a fake Cat Phantom trying to steal the werewolf pumpkins. 🎃

q.en: What season is it when the story opens in New Mouse City?
q.zh: 故事在新老鼠城开场时，是什么季节？

options.en: Spring according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 春天（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo loves fall and enjoys a beautiful autumn morning with the smell of damp leaves and cheese pastries.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩很喜欢秋天，故事开头他正享受一个美丽的秋日早晨，空气里有湿叶子和奶酪酥饼的香味。

q.en: Which three rodents does Geronimo first overhear whispering mysteriously at the office?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩最初在报社里撞见哪三只老鼠在神秘地窃窃私语？

options.en: Vanessa Vogue, Thea, and Cara DeColores
options.zh: 瓦妮莎·沃格、西娅和卡拉·德科洛雷斯
本杰明、特拉普和穆塞拉

options.en: Creepella, Boneham, and Boris according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 克里佩拉、 Boneham 和鲍里斯（按书中另一种说法）
阿尔文、加斯帕和费利克斯

explain.en: He finds Vanessa Vogue (fashion journalist), his sister Thea, and Cara DeColores (graphic designer) whispering about something 'scary and scream-worthy'.
explain.zh: 他撞见时尚记者瓦妮莎·沃格、妹妹西娅和平面设计师卡拉·德科洛雷斯在嘀咕一件「吓人、值得尖叫」的事。

q.en: What strange vehicle does Geronimo see parked outside The Rodent's Gazette?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在《鼠民公报》社外看到了什么奇怪的车？

options.en: A cheese delivery van according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一辆送奶酪的货车（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: A long black car from 'Funeral Movers' unloading coffin-shaped boxes
options.zh: 一辆来自「殡葬搬运公司」的黑色长车，正在卸棺材形状的箱子

explain.en: He sees a long black car marked 'Funeral Movers' with rodents in black unloading coffin-shaped boxes, the strangest encounter of all.
explain.zh: 他看到一辆标着「殡葬搬运公司」的黑色长车，几个穿黑衣的老鼠正在卸棺材形状的箱子，这是最诡异的一幕。

q.en: Where do Thea, Mousita, and Creepella send Geronimo for a 'stress-free vacation'?
q.zh: 西娅、穆西塔和克里佩拉把杰罗尼摩送去哪里「放松心情」？

explain.en: Creepella whisks him away to spooky Cacklefur Castle, arriving at the stroke of midnight — the witching hour.
explain.zh: 克里佩拉把他带到了阴森的咔嗒咔嚓城堡，到达时正好是午夜——女巫时分。

q.en: What is the name of the scary room Geronimo stays in at the castle?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在城堡里住的那间恐怖房间叫什么？

options.en: The Room of the Headless Ghost
The Kitchen of Chef Stewrat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 炖菜厨师的大厨房（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Boneham shows him to 'The Room of the Headless Ghost', the scariest room in the whole castle.
explain.zh: 管家 Boneham 把他领到「无头幽灵之屋」——整座城堡里最吓人的房间。

q.en: Who is the new gardener at Cacklefur Castle who blushes around Creepella?
q.zh: 咔嗒咔嚓城堡新来的园丁是谁，他在克里佩拉面前会脸红？

explain.en: Felix Bloomfur, a muscular rodent in a flower-patterned green shirt and round sunglasses, stares at Creepella and turns red as a tomato.
explain.zh: 费利克斯·布鲁姆弗穿着花朵图案的绿衬衫、戴着圆框墨镜，盯着克里佩拉看，脸红得像番茄。

q.en: What unusual plants guard Cacklefur Castle?
q.zh: 什么奇特的植物守护着咔嗒咔嚓城堡？

options.en: Carnivorous roses according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 食肉玫瑰（按书中另一种说法）
狼人南瓜（贪吃啃咬南瓜）

explain.en: The werewolf pumpkins are enormous, can bite with thirty-three teeth, pull themselves up by their roots, and chase intruders.
explain.zh: 狼人南瓜巨大无比，能用三十三颗利齿啃咬，还能靠根须立起来追咬入侵者。

q.en: What clue proves the 'Cat Phantom' is NOT a real cat or ghost?
q.zh: 什么线索证明「猫幽灵」既不是真猫也不是真鬼？

options.en: It writes a note in the diary
options.zh: 它在日记里写了张纸条

options.en: It leaves footprints in the snow according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它在雪地上留下了脚印（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: It flies away on a broom
It says 'SQUEAK' and 'OUCH', and a fake furry tail is found
options.zh: 它发出「吱吱」声、喊「哎哟」，还找到了一条假毛尾巴

explain.en: Cats don't squeak and ghosts don't yell 'ouch' — plus Geronimo finds a bitten, furry fake cat tail, proving it was a costume.
explain.zh: 猫不会「吱吱」叫，鬼也不会喊「哎哟」——而且杰罗尼摩找到一条被咬过的毛茸茸假猫尾，证明那只是伪装。

q.en: How do Geronimo and Creepella catch the real fake phantom?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和克里佩拉是怎样抓住那个冒牌「幽灵」的？

options.en: Creepella invites each guest for a moonlight walk; Felix jumps over the tent cord, showing he knew it was there
options.zh: 克里佩拉约每位爱慕者月下散步；费利克斯跳过了帐篷绳，说明他早就知道绳子在那

options.en: They ask the Headless Ghost for help according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book from a different part of Mouse Island
options.zh: 他们请无头幽灵帮忙（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）（来自老鼠岛的另一处）

explain.en: Alvin and Gaspar both trip on the cord, but Felix jumps over it — proving he was the one who had tripped on it as the 'Cat Phantom'.
explain.zh: 阿尔文和加斯帕都绊在了绳子上，只有费利克斯跳了过去——证明他才是那个扮成「猫幽灵」的人。

q.en: Who is Felix Bloomfur really working for?
q.zh: 费利克斯·布鲁姆弗到底在为谁卖命？

options.en: Madame No, the Mega Director of EGO Corp
options.zh: 诺夫人，巨型企业 EGO 的总裁

options.en: Professor Alvin Testerly according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 阿尔文·泰斯特利教授（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: He removes his blond wig and mirrored sunglasses to reveal he is one of Madame No's bodyguards, sent to steal the werewolf pumpkins.
explain.zh: 他摘下金色假发和镜面墨镜，暴露出自己是诺夫人手下的保镖，奉命来偷狼人南瓜。
